# Debugability — triggering scenarios on demand

Every lever for REPRODUCING a conversational/pipeline scenario without waiting
for it to happen naturally. Companion to [observability.md](observability.md)
(which covers how to SEE what happened). Station base: `http://<station>:8099`.

## Inject utterances (no mic)

- `POST /api/brain/:dock/debug/say {text}` — tap + addressed final in one shot
  → a REAL turn (LLM runs, dock speaks/moves). The basic "make it do a turn".
- `POST /api/brain/:dock/debug/hear {text, [startedAt], [endedAt], [confTier]}`
  — a final with NO tap: exactly what a live mic final looks like. Exercises
  skip:not-addressed, queue:busy (mid-turn), merge:supersede (while thinking),
  stop-intent ("stop"/"wait"), wake matching, skip:garbage (confTier:"garbage").
  Response echoes the resulting conversation state.
- `POST /api/brain/:dock/debug/event {event, [endedAt], [text]}` — inject a raw
  conversation event (tap etc.) to drive the state machine directly.
- adb (debug builds): `adb shell am broadcast -a dev.orbit.dock.debug.SAY -e
  text '…'` — a turn driven from the phone side (DebugTestReceiver).

## Real-audio scenarios (the honest path)

- Laptop speaker near the dock: `say "hey orbit, …"` (macOS TTS) → real mic →
  SFU → server VAD → STT → brain. The only path that exercises endpointing,
  voiced-fraction, echo, and barge for real.
- Barge-in: start a long reply (`debug/say {"text":"tell me a long story"}`),
  then `say "stop"` mid-playback — watch vad:onset → barge:hold → stop/resume/
  yield on the timeline.
- Skills (this repo, for Claude sessions): `stress-dock-pipeline` — hammer the
  pipeline with real audio + adb taps, judge from station ground truth; run
  scenarios MANY times (real bugs are intermittent). `two-dock-converse` —
  full spoken conversation from the laptop.
- Verification rule (docs/memory): sign-off = the USER's modality. Injected
  paths prove mechanism only; a fix "works" when a human try works.

## Conversation-state levers

- Tap/palm: tap the dock face; or `debug/event` with a tap. Palm = open-only.
- `POST /api/brain/:dock/debug/tts-hold {hold:bool}` — drive the barge pause
  (tts-hold frame) directly, no audio needed.
- `POST /api/brain/:dock/quiet {on}` — 🤐 quiet mode (skip:quiet path).
- `POST /api/brain/:dock/think {text?}` — poke a self-thought turn.
- `POST /api/brain/:dock/session/end` — close the session lane.
- `GET /api/brain/:dock/conversation` — live mode/window probe while driving.
- `GET /api/brain/:dock/listening` — the interim listening gate state.

## Replays (re-run recorded reality)

- Turn replay: `POST /api/brain/:dock/replay {sessionId, turnId}` (or obs ▶) —
  re-drives a recorded turn's responses through the LIVE pipeline, no LLM:
  isolates sequencing/TTS/body from model behavior.
- Perception takes: Studio `/#perception` takes save/load/replay
  (`/api/perception/takes*`) — A/B replay recorded A/V through changed
  perception code/prompts.
- Utterance clips: every clip (incl. dropped) at
  `GET /api/perception/utterance-audio/<dock>/<audioStartMs>` — re-feed to the
  STT sidecar (`POST :8078/transcribe`) to re-judge a transcript offline.
- Capture harness: `/#capture` + capture module — record a window of clean
  ambient perception (dock responses suppressed; brain traces skip:recording).

## Face / body / vision probes

- `GET /api/brain/:dock/debug/face` — what the phone face is ACTUALLY showing;
  `POST` `{expression}` forces a mood (no LLM).
- `POST /api/brain/:dock/debug/face/film {count, everyMs}` — sample the face
  over time → JPEGs under var/debug/face/<runId>/ (state-vs-render races).
- Body: `POST /api/bodylink/command` (raw servo), `/api/bodylink/play`
  (sequence), `GET /api/bodylink/state`, `/holder` (lease), `/health-check`.
- Live camera frame: `GET /api/perception/frame/<peerId>` (see memory:
  ota-auto-apply); vision turn input frames land in obs (📷).

## Kill-switches & thresholds (config console `/#config` or env)

- `brainBargeHold=false` — disable the barge polite-pause.
- `brainVoiceStop=false` — disable reflex voice-stop/dismiss.
- `brainThinkingMerge=false` — disable merge-supersede while thinking.
- `STT_ECHO_GATE=1` — re-enable the echo mute (kills barge audio; default off).
- `STT_MIN_VOICED_PCT=0` — disable the voiced-fraction gate (phantom risk
  returns); raise/lower to probe the barge-drop band.
- `STT_SILENCE_RMS`, `STT_ENDPOINT_MS`, `STT_MIN_UTTERANCE_MS`,
  `STT_ONSET_RMS`, `STT_ONSET_SUSTAIN_MS` — VAD/endpoint/barge-onset floors.
- `CONV_LISTEN_MS`, `CONV_FOLLOWUP_MS`, `CONV_GRACE_MS`, `CONV_FACE_ARRIVAL=1`
  — window timings / wake-on-look.
- Perception enricher paths: console toggles (speech / non-speech triggers);
  `PERCEPTION_ENRICH_SAVE=1` dumps enricher WAVs to listen back.

## End-to-end sanity

- `cd orbit-station && npm run smoke` — fake dock + body peers against a live
  station (no hardware).
- `npm test --workspace server` — unit suite (conversation-state, stop-intent,
  busy-queue, addressed, obs, cost…). `cd node-dock/app && ./gradlew test`.
- After any scenario: read it back on `/#timeline` or pull
  `GET /api/observability/incident?dock&from&to&format=md` and hand the
  markdown to an LLM.
